channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nearly 208,000 heated socks sold at Costco recalled due to burn injuries
item.description: The 32 Degrees Heated Socks can pose a burn risk due to the combination of heat, friction, moisture and pressure created during athletic activities.

item.title: Multiple victims reported in shooting at mall in Louisiana: Officials
item.description: Multiple victims have been reported in a shooting at the Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge, according to Baton Rouge Mayor-President Sid Edwards.

item.title: Gold is priced at $4,700 an ounce. Here's how to invest for under $100 now.
item.description: Gold prices are still sitting near record highs, but there are smart ways to invest with $100 or less today.

item.title: Debris from Hurricane Helene is helping fuel Georgia’s wildfires
WATCH: What does reclassification mean for marijuana users?
item.description: A new order moves marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, putting state-licensed medical marijuana in the same category as some pain medications, k...

item.title: WATCH: 1st look at 'The Cult of NatureBoy'
item.description: "GMA" shares a preview at the new Hulu docuseries following social media figure NatureBoy and his followers in search of utopia.

item.title: Police respond to reported shooting at Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge
item.description: Police are responding to reports of a shooting at the Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge.

item.title: Here's how much interest a $15,000 money market account can earn now
item.description: interest earnings on a $15,000 money market account can still be significant. Here's what savers need to know now.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump orders Navy to 'shoot,' 'kill' boats putting mines in strait
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Here's how much more affordable a $40,000 home equity loan is now compared to 2025
item.description: Thought a $40,000 a home equity loan was affordable in 2025? Here's how much cheaper the monthly payments are now.

item.title: WATCH: ‘GMA’ anchors get quizzed by kids
item.description: On Bring a Kid to Work Day, the children of “GMA” staffers put questions to the morning show’s anchors.

item.title: LaGuardia firefighter heard ‘stop, stop, stop’ before deadly crash but didn’t know who it was for
Trump reclassifies state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug in a historic shift
item.description: A cannabis industry group calls President Donald Trump’s reclassification of state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug “the most signi...
